message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The terminal is currently polluted because commands were sent while the foreground grid search script was still running. The immediate priority is to regain a clean shell prompt, kill any stray fastText processes, and inspect any grid results/logs that may have been produced. Based on the evidence so far, no `/app/model.bin` has been verified and the grid search likely did not complete. After inspection, I will move to a faster final training strategy if needed.",
  "plan": "1. Send Ctrl+C as a standalone keystroke to interrupt the active foreground script and regain the prompt.
2. Run a single combined recovery/inspection command to kill stray fastText processes, verify none remain, print grid results, list grid files, and tail grid logs. This avoids further concatenation issues and provides evidence for the next decision.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "C-c
",
      "duration": 3.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- clean inspection after interrupt ---'
for p in /proc/[0-9]*; do
  cmd=$(tr '\0' ' ' < "$p/cmdline" 2>/dev/null)
  case "$cmd" in
    *fasttext*) echo "killing ${p##*/}: $cmd"; kill -KILL "${p##*/}" 2>/dev/null || true;;
  esac
done
sleep 2
grep -l 'fasttext' /proc/*/comm 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'no fasttext procs'
echo '--- grid results ---'
cat /app/work/grid_results.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'no grid_results.txt'
echo '--- grid files ---'
ls -lh /app/work/grid_*.* 2>/dev/null || echo 'no grid files'
echo '--- grid logs ---'
for f in /app/work/grid_*.log; do echo "=== $f ==="; tail -10 "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
",
      "duration": 12.0
    }
  ]
}
